title: English transaction input examples
content:
Purchased goods 50000 from ABC on credit → Dr Purchase Cr Creditor.
Paid rent 20000 cash → Dr Rent Cr Cash.
Received eSewa 8000 → Dr eSewa Cr Sales/Receivable.
Owner withdrew 15000 personal → Dr Drawings Cr Cash.

title: Nepali Devanagari input examples
content:
रामलाई ३,०००को उधारोमा सामान दियो = credit sale Dr Debtor Cr Sales.
बैंकमा ३०,००० जम्मा गरियो = bank deposit contra Dr Bank Cr Cash.
कर्मचारीलाई तलब १८,००० = Dr Salary Cr Cash.

title: Informal / broken Roman Nepali patterns
content:
ram 3k diyeko (clarify direction). maal aai halyo 50k. sahule maagy bhai.
Voice errors: dukaro=udharo, esuwa=esewa, fon pay=FonePay, tee dee es=TDS, bhatt beel=VAT bill.
Always clarify before recording.
